records.m_Talk_ENG: W-we did it! The monsters are retreating!
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-we did it! The monsters are retreating!
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-we did it! The monsters are retreating!

records.m_Talk_ENG: They're all down! We won!
records.m_Talk_DEU: They're all down! We won!
records.m_Talk_FRA: They're all down! We won!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did... Did we really win?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did... Did we really win?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did... Did we really win?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha! Don't tell me you're crying, Captain!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha! Don't tell me you're crying, Captain!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha! Don't tell me you're crying, Captain!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, come on. Don't wound the tender heart of our maidenly Captain!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, come on. Don't wound the tender heart of our maidenly Captain!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, come on. Don't wound the tender heart of our maidenly Captain!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're fine, Captain. With those helmets on, no one can see anyway. Cry all you want.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're fine, Captain. With those helmets on, no one can see anyway. Cry all you want.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're fine, Captain. With those helmets on, no one can see anyway. Cry all you want.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am not a maiden, and I did not cry!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am not a maiden, and I did not cry!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am not a maiden, and I did not cry!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Phew.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Phew.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Phew.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Great work. Thanks to you, Dame Esterosa, we made it through with barely any casualties.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Great work. Thanks to you, Dame Esterosa, we made it through with barely any casualties.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Great work. Thanks to you, Dame Esterosa, we made it through with barely any casualties.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, it was all of you. Your efforts made it possible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, it was all of you. Your efforts made it possible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, it was all of you. Your efforts made it possible.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
It's all over now. So we can finally head ba
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
It's all over now. So we can finally head ba
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
It's all over now. So we can finally head ba
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What is it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What is it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What is it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-It's nothing. I just felt something. A chill.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-It's nothing. I just felt something. A chill.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-It's nothing. I just felt something. A chill.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It felt like...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It felt like...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It felt like...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? What's that? A giant monster?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? What's that? A giant monster?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? What's that? A giant monster?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did one slip past us? Let's deal with it and head back.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did one slip past us? Let's deal with it and head back.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did one slip past us? Let's deal with it and head back.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't move! Everyone stay back!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't move! Everyone stay back!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't move! Everyone stay back!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-What's... happening to my body...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-What's... happening to my body...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-What's... happening to my body...?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
My
8g My body's been cut in half?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
My
8g My body's been cut in half?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
My
8g My body's been cut in half?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That poison I sense from it... I-it can't be...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That poison I sense from it... I-it can't be...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That poison I sense from it... I-it can't be...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone, prepare for battle! It's the Demon Lord, Nehemoth!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone, prepare for battle! It's the Demon Lord, Nehemoth!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone, prepare for battle! It's the Demon Lord, Nehemoth!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That giant is the Demon Lord Nehemoth?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That giant is the Demon Lord Nehemoth?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That giant is the Demon Lord Nehemoth?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
But Nehemoth was supposed to be
8g!!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
But Nehemoth was supposed to be
8g!!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
But Nehemoth was supposed to be
8g!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Captain, it's still three hours until sunrise.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Captain, it's still three hours until sunrise.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Captain, it's still three hours until sunrise.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We can't handle the Demon Lord alone...
records.m_Talk_DEU: We can't handle the Demon Lord alone...
records.m_Talk_FRA: We can't handle the Demon Lord alone...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, I'm well aware.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, I'm well aware.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, I'm well aware.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In the end... Our time has come, I suppose.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In the end... Our time has come, I suppose.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In the end... Our time has come, I suppose.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone who can still fight, move out to protect Dame Grace.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone who can still fight, move out to protect Dame Grace.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone who can still fight, move out to protect Dame Grace.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The rest will stall the enemy. Use the time to regroup and return to the capital.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The rest will stall the enemy. Use the time to regroup and return to the capital.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The rest will stall the enemy. Use the time to regroup and return to the capital.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Leave the wounded behind? What do you mean?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Leave the wounded behind? What do you mean?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Leave the wounded behind? What do you mean?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're only buying time. There's no need to worry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're only buying time. There's no need to worry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're only buying time. There's no need to worry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You may encounter C.O.s on the way. You should move quickly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You may encounter C.O.s on the way. You should move quickly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You may encounter C.O.s on the way. You should move quickly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Captain, I heard you never told your sister about this mission.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Captain, I heard you never told your sister about this mission.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Captain, I heard you never told your sister about this mission.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you really all right with that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you really all right with that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you really all right with that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's exactly why I don't want to show her a shameful end.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's exactly why I don't want to show her a shameful end.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's exactly why I don't want to show her a shameful end.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's been an honor fighting beside you, Sir Ferron.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's been an honor fighting beside you, Sir Ferron.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's been an honor fighting beside you, Sir Ferron.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, I...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, I...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, I...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's go, Dame Esterosa.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's go, Dame Esterosa.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's go, Dame Esterosa.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we don't trust them, who will?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we don't trust them, who will?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we don't trust them, who will?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Every story begins with a question. There's no need to understand right away.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Every story begins with a question. There's no need to understand right away.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Every story begins with a question. There's no need to understand right away.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But you were right. This place is a reconstruction of the past as you speculated.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But you were right. This place is a reconstruction of the past as you speculated.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But you were right. This place is a reconstruction of the past as you speculated.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And when the story reaches its end, you'll reach the truth in one form or another.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And when the story reaches its end, you'll reach the truth in one form or another.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And when the story reaches its end, you'll reach the truth in one form or another.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll be waiting, Sir Ferron.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll be waiting, Sir Ferron.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll be waiting, Sir Ferron.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course. Take care of Dame Grace.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course. Take care of Dame Grace.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course. Take care of Dame Grace.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, you give us time for farewells. How merciful, Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, you give us time for farewells. How merciful, Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, you give us time for farewells. How merciful, Demon Lord.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Or maybe, we're simply not worth your effort at all?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Or maybe, we're simply not worth your effort at all?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Or maybe, we're simply not worth your effort at all?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You cling to foolish hope.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You cling to foolish hope.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You cling to foolish hope.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your worthless sacrifice will change nothing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your worthless sacrifice will change nothing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your worthless sacrifice will change nothing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's fine. All I need to do is keep you here, just for one second longer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's fine. All I need to do is keep you here, just for one second longer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's fine. All I need to do is keep you here, just for one second longer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's the second meaning of life that Dame Grace gave me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's the second meaning of life that Dame Grace gave me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's the second meaning of life that Dame Grace gave me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I see.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I see.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I see.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then I too shall honor your resolve.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then I too shall honor your resolve.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then I too shall honor your resolve.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Knights! This is our final battlefield, where we fulfill our duty!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Knights! This is our final battlefield, where we fulfill our duty!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Knights! This is our final battlefield, where we fulfill our duty!

records.m_Talk_ENG: So that those who carry our will may seize new hope one day!
records.m_Talk_DEU: So that those who carry our will may seize new hope one day!
records.m_Talk_FRA: So that those who carry our will may seize new hope one day!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let our pride be carved into this land!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let our pride be carved into this land!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let our pride be carved into this land!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ferron of the House of Lowell, follower of the stars.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ferron of the House of Lowell, follower of the stars.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ferron of the House of Lowell, follower of the stars.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Here, I will follow the final guidance of the stars.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Here, I will follow the final guidance of the stars.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Here, I will follow the final guidance of the stars.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff...* *Huff...*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff...* *Huff...*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff...* *Huff...*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nngh...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nngh...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nngh...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The soldiers at the base... they're all gone too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The soldiers at the base... they're all gone too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The soldiers at the base... they're all gone too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: D-did the Demon Lord's poison trigger the C.O.s?
records.m_Talk_DEU: D-did the Demon Lord's poison trigger the C.O.s?
records.m_Talk_FRA: D-did the Demon Lord's poison trigger the C.O.s?

records.m_Talk_ENG: *...Sigh* She'd give me an earful for showing up so fast.
records.m_Talk_DEU: *...Sigh* She'd give me an earful for showing up so fast.
records.m_Talk_FRA: *...Sigh* She'd give me an earful for showing up so fast.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dame Esterosa, please watch over the Countess.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dame Esterosa, please watch over the Countess.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dame Esterosa, please watch over the Countess.

records.m_Talk_ENG: While you're at it, could you ask her to pay a hefty sum and send it to my sister?
records.m_Talk_DEU: While you're at it, could you ask her to pay a hefty sum and send it to my sister?
records.m_Talk_FRA: While you're at it, could you ask her to pay a hefty sum and send it to my sister?

records.m_Talk_ENG: These C.O.s aren't a problem.
records.m_Talk_DEU: These C.O.s aren't a problem.
records.m_Talk_FRA: These C.O.s aren't a problem.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As long as the survivors work together...
records.m_Talk_DEU: As long as the survivors work together...
records.m_Talk_FRA: As long as the survivors work together...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But if the Demon Lord catches up, we're all done for.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But if the Demon Lord catches up, we're all done for.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But if the Demon Lord catches up, we're all done for.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If not you, Dame Esterosa, who else can protect Dame Grace?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If not you, Dame Esterosa, who else can protect Dame Grace?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If not you, Dame Esterosa, who else can protect Dame Grace?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That horse...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That horse...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That horse...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Old man Clinton. Why'd he insist on staying behind?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Old man Clinton. Why'd he insist on staying behind?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Old man Clinton. Why'd he insist on staying behind?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Still, it's a weight off my shoulders. With a horse, you'll reach the Countess in time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still, it's a weight off my shoulders. With a horse, you'll reach the Countess in time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still, it's a weight off my shoulders. With a horse, you'll reach the Countess in time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But you're the knights of the County. If you don't go, who will protect Dame Grace...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But you're the knights of the County. If you don't go, who will protect Dame Grace...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But you're the knights of the County. If you don't go, who will protect Dame Grace...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please, Dame Esterosa.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please, Dame Esterosa.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please, Dame Esterosa.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let us keep our pride, just this once.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let us keep our pride, just this once.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let us keep our pride, just this once.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As he handed me the reins, his hands trembled.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As he handed me the reins, his hands trembled.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As he handed me the reins, his hands trembled.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Only then did I notice that through his helmet, his eyes were glistening with fear.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Only then did I notice that through his helmet, his eyes were glistening with fear.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Only then did I notice that through his helmet, his eyes were glistening with fear.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Leave it to me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Leave it to me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Leave it to me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will protect Dame Grace.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will protect Dame Grace.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will protect Dame Grace.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you. If there's such a thing as a next life, I hope we can fight together again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you. If there's such a thing as a next life, I hope we can fight together again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you. If there's such a thing as a next life, I hope we can fight together again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if I'm just swinging a something like a bamboo sword like always.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if I'm just swinging a something like a bamboo sword like always.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if I'm just swinging a something like a bamboo sword like always.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Damn it. I don't want to die.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Damn it. I don't want to die.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Damn it. I don't want to die.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you for coming all this way.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you for coming all this way.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you for coming all this way.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We meet face-to-face at last, Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We meet face-to-face at last, Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We meet face-to-face at last, Demon Lord.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I see.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I see.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I see.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So you are the current Star Guide.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So you are the current Star Guide.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So you are the current Star Guide.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What happened to my knights?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What happened to my knights?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What happened to my knights?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I granted them the rest they longed for and killed everyone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I granted them the rest they longed for and killed everyone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I granted them the rest they longed for and killed everyone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For the Demon Lord himself to come for someone like me. How unusual.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For the Demon Lord himself to come for someone like me. How unusual.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For the Demon Lord himself to come for someone like me. How unusual.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Were you that afraid of humanity's counterattack?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Were you that afraid of humanity's counterattack?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Were you that afraid of humanity's counterattack?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The ember of hope you leave behind reeks of defiance.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The ember of hope you leave behind reeks of defiance.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The ember of hope you leave behind reeks of defiance.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hope that defeat isn't the end... That is unbearably cruel to me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hope that defeat isn't the end... That is unbearably cruel to me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hope that defeat isn't the end... That is unbearably cruel to me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And so, I've come to sever that cycle myself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And so, I've come to sever that cycle myself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And so, I've come to sever that cycle myself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To bring about the ending I desire, through the end of this world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To bring about the ending I desire, through the end of this world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To bring about the ending I desire, through the end of this world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A being who's stolen so many lives wishing for his own end. How contradictory.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A being who's stolen so many lives wishing for his own end. How contradictory.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A being who's stolen so many lives wishing for his own end. How contradictory.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you're the Star Guide, you should know that this is an eternal cycle.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you're the Star Guide, you should know that this is an eternal cycle.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you're the Star Guide, you should know that this is an eternal cycle.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'd do anything to break free of it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'd do anything to break free of it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'd do anything to break free of it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if it means destroying the world with my own hands.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if it means destroying the world with my own hands.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if it means destroying the world with my own hands.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Surely you too tried to cast off your fate by passing your burden onto someone else?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Surely you too tried to cast off your fate by passing your burden onto someone else?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Surely you too tried to cast off your fate by passing your burden onto someone else?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You and I are no different.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You and I are no different.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You and I are no different.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We just stand on opposite sides of a fading line.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We just stand on opposite sides of a fading line.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We just stand on opposite sides of a fading line.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am nothing like you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am nothing like you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am nothing like you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So you choose a futile struggle.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So you choose a futile struggle.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So you choose a futile struggle.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is why your kind will lose.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That is why your kind will lose.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is why your kind will lose.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Allow me to offer you a prophecy as the Star Guide.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Allow me to offer you a prophecy as the Star Guide.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Allow me to offer you a prophecy as the Star Guide.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The peace you seek will never come, Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The peace you seek will never come, Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The peace you seek will never come, Demon Lord.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then I too shall proclaim, as the Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then I too shall proclaim, as the Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then I too shall proclaim, as the Demon Lord.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In this world, there will be no salvation for your kind.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In this world, there will be no salvation for your kind.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In this world, there will be no salvation for your kind.

root.m_Talk_ENG: W-we did it! The monsters are retreating!
root.m_Talk_DEU: W-we did it! The monsters are retreating!
root.m_Talk_FRA: W-we did it! The monsters are retreating!

root.m_Talk_ENG: They're all down! We won!
root.m_Talk_DEU: They're all down! We won!
root.m_Talk_FRA: They're all down! We won!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did... Did we really win?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did... Did we really win?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did... Did we really win?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha! Don't tell me you're crying, Captain!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha! Don't tell me you're crying, Captain!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha! Don't tell me you're crying, Captain!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, come on. Don't wound the tender heart of our maidenly Captain!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, come on. Don't wound the tender heart of our maidenly Captain!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, come on. Don't wound the tender heart of our maidenly Captain!

root.m_Talk_ENG: We're fine, Captain. With those helmets on, no one can see anyway. Cry all you want.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We're fine, Captain. With those helmets on, no one can see anyway. Cry all you want.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We're fine, Captain. With those helmets on, no one can see anyway. Cry all you want.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I am not a maiden, and I did not cry!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I am not a maiden, and I did not cry!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I am not a maiden, and I did not cry!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Phew.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Phew.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Phew.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Great work. Thanks to you, Dame Esterosa, we made it through with barely any casualties.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Great work. Thanks to you, Dame Esterosa, we made it through with barely any casualties.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Great work. Thanks to you, Dame Esterosa, we made it through with barely any casualties.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No, it was all of you. Your efforts made it possible.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No, it was all of you. Your efforts made it possible.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No, it was all of you. Your efforts made it possible.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
It's all over now. So we can finally head ba
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
It's all over now. So we can finally head ba
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
It's all over now. So we can finally head ba
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Huh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Huh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Huh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What is it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What is it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What is it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I-It's nothing. I just felt something. A chill.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I-It's nothing. I just felt something. A chill.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I-It's nothing. I just felt something. A chill.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It felt like...
root.m_Talk_DEU: It felt like...
root.m_Talk_FRA: It felt like...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? What's that? A giant monster?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? What's that? A giant monster?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? What's that? A giant monster?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did one slip past us? Let's deal with it and head back.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did one slip past us? Let's deal with it and head back.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did one slip past us? Let's deal with it and head back.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't move! Everyone stay back!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't move! Everyone stay back!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't move! Everyone stay back!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: W-What's... happening to my body...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: W-What's... happening to my body...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: W-What's... happening to my body...?

root.m_Talk_ENG:
My
8g My body's been cut in half?
root.m_Talk_DEU:
My
8g My body's been cut in half?
root.m_Talk_FRA:
My
8g My body's been cut in half?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That poison I sense from it... I-it can't be...
root.m_Talk_DEU: That poison I sense from it... I-it can't be...
root.m_Talk_FRA: That poison I sense from it... I-it can't be...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone, prepare for battle! It's the Demon Lord, Nehemoth!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone, prepare for battle! It's the Demon Lord, Nehemoth!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone, prepare for battle! It's the Demon Lord, Nehemoth!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: That giant is the Demon Lord Nehemoth?
root.m_Talk_DEU: That giant is the Demon Lord Nehemoth?
root.m_Talk_FRA: That giant is the Demon Lord Nehemoth?

root.m_Talk_ENG:
But Nehemoth was supposed to be
8g!!
root.m_Talk_DEU:
But Nehemoth was supposed to be
8g!!
root.m_Talk_FRA:
But Nehemoth was supposed to be
8g!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Captain, it's still three hours until sunrise.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Captain, it's still three hours until sunrise.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Captain, it's still three hours until sunrise.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We can't handle the Demon Lord alone...
root.m_Talk_DEU: We can't handle the Demon Lord alone...
root.m_Talk_FRA: We can't handle the Demon Lord alone...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, I'm well aware.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, I'm well aware.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, I'm well aware.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In the end... Our time has come, I suppose.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In the end... Our time has come, I suppose.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In the end... Our time has come, I suppose.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone who can still fight, move out to protect Dame Grace.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone who can still fight, move out to protect Dame Grace.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone who can still fight, move out to protect Dame Grace.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The rest will stall the enemy. Use the time to regroup and return to the capital.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The rest will stall the enemy. Use the time to regroup and return to the capital.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The rest will stall the enemy. Use the time to regroup and return to the capital.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Leave the wounded behind? What do you mean?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Leave the wounded behind? What do you mean?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Leave the wounded behind? What do you mean?

root.m_Talk_ENG: We're only buying time. There's no need to worry.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We're only buying time. There's no need to worry.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We're only buying time. There's no need to worry.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You may encounter C.O.s on the way. You should move quickly.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You may encounter C.O.s on the way. You should move quickly.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You may encounter C.O.s on the way. You should move quickly.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Captain, I heard you never told your sister about this mission.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Captain, I heard you never told your sister about this mission.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Captain, I heard you never told your sister about this mission.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you really all right with that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you really all right with that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you really all right with that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's exactly why I don't want to show her a shameful end.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's exactly why I don't want to show her a shameful end.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's exactly why I don't want to show her a shameful end.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's been an honor fighting beside you, Sir Ferron.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's been an honor fighting beside you, Sir Ferron.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's been an honor fighting beside you, Sir Ferron.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, I...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, I...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, I...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let's go, Dame Esterosa.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let's go, Dame Esterosa.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's go, Dame Esterosa.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If we don't trust them, who will?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If we don't trust them, who will?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If we don't trust them, who will?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Every story begins with a question. There's no need to understand right away.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Every story begins with a question. There's no need to understand right away.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Every story begins with a question. There's no need to understand right away.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But you were right. This place is a reconstruction of the past as you speculated.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But you were right. This place is a reconstruction of the past as you speculated.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But you were right. This place is a reconstruction of the past as you speculated.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And when the story reaches its end, you'll reach the truth in one form or another.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And when the story reaches its end, you'll reach the truth in one form or another.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And when the story reaches its end, you'll reach the truth in one form or another.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll be waiting, Sir Ferron.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll be waiting, Sir Ferron.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll be waiting, Sir Ferron.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course. Take care of Dame Grace.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course. Take care of Dame Grace.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course. Take care of Dame Grace.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, you give us time for farewells. How merciful, Demon Lord.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, you give us time for farewells. How merciful, Demon Lord.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, you give us time for farewells. How merciful, Demon Lord.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Or maybe, we're simply not worth your effort at all?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Or maybe, we're simply not worth your effort at all?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Or maybe, we're simply not worth your effort at all?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You cling to foolish hope.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You cling to foolish hope.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You cling to foolish hope.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Your worthless sacrifice will change nothing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Your worthless sacrifice will change nothing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Your worthless sacrifice will change nothing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's fine. All I need to do is keep you here, just for one second longer.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's fine. All I need to do is keep you here, just for one second longer.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's fine. All I need to do is keep you here, just for one second longer.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's the second meaning of life that Dame Grace gave me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's the second meaning of life that Dame Grace gave me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's the second meaning of life that Dame Grace gave me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I see.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I see.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I see.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then I too shall honor your resolve.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then I too shall honor your resolve.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then I too shall honor your resolve.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Knights! This is our final battlefield, where we fulfill our duty!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Knights! This is our final battlefield, where we fulfill our duty!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Knights! This is our final battlefield, where we fulfill our duty!

root.m_Talk_ENG: So that those who carry our will may seize new hope one day!
root.m_Talk_DEU: So that those who carry our will may seize new hope one day!
root.m_Talk_FRA: So that those who carry our will may seize new hope one day!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let our pride be carved into this land!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let our pride be carved into this land!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let our pride be carved into this land!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ferron of the House of Lowell, follower of the stars.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ferron of the House of Lowell, follower of the stars.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ferron of the House of Lowell, follower of the stars.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Here, I will follow the final guidance of the stars.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Here, I will follow the final guidance of the stars.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Here, I will follow the final guidance of the stars.

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff...* *Huff...*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff...* *Huff...*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff...* *Huff...*

root.m_Talk_ENG: Nngh...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Nngh...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Nngh...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The soldiers at the base... they're all gone too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The soldiers at the base... they're all gone too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The soldiers at the base... they're all gone too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: D-did the Demon Lord's poison trigger the C.O.s?
root.m_Talk_DEU: D-did the Demon Lord's poison trigger the C.O.s?
root.m_Talk_FRA: D-did the Demon Lord's poison trigger the C.O.s?

root.m_Talk_ENG: *...Sigh* She'd give me an earful for showing up so fast.
root.m_Talk_DEU: *...Sigh* She'd give me an earful for showing up so fast.
root.m_Talk_FRA: *...Sigh* She'd give me an earful for showing up so fast.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Dame Esterosa, please watch over the Countess.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Dame Esterosa, please watch over the Countess.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Dame Esterosa, please watch over the Countess.

root.m_Talk_ENG: While you're at it, could you ask her to pay a hefty sum and send it to my sister?
root.m_Talk_DEU: While you're at it, could you ask her to pay a hefty sum and send it to my sister?
root.m_Talk_FRA: While you're at it, could you ask her to pay a hefty sum and send it to my sister?

root.m_Talk_ENG: These C.O.s aren't a problem.
root.m_Talk_DEU: These C.O.s aren't a problem.
root.m_Talk_FRA: These C.O.s aren't a problem.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As long as the survivors work together...
root.m_Talk_DEU: As long as the survivors work together...
root.m_Talk_FRA: As long as the survivors work together...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But if the Demon Lord catches up, we're all done for.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But if the Demon Lord catches up, we're all done for.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But if the Demon Lord catches up, we're all done for.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If not you, Dame Esterosa, who else can protect Dame Grace?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If not you, Dame Esterosa, who else can protect Dame Grace?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If not you, Dame Esterosa, who else can protect Dame Grace?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That horse...
root.m_Talk_DEU: That horse...
root.m_Talk_FRA: That horse...

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Old man Clinton. Why'd he insist on staying behind?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Old man Clinton. Why'd he insist on staying behind?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Old man Clinton. Why'd he insist on staying behind?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Still, it's a weight off my shoulders. With a horse, you'll reach the Countess in time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Still, it's a weight off my shoulders. With a horse, you'll reach the Countess in time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Still, it's a weight off my shoulders. With a horse, you'll reach the Countess in time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But you're the knights of the County. If you don't go, who will protect Dame Grace...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But you're the knights of the County. If you don't go, who will protect Dame Grace...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But you're the knights of the County. If you don't go, who will protect Dame Grace...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Please, Dame Esterosa.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Please, Dame Esterosa.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Please, Dame Esterosa.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let us keep our pride, just this once.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let us keep our pride, just this once.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let us keep our pride, just this once.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As he handed me the reins, his hands trembled.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As he handed me the reins, his hands trembled.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As he handed me the reins, his hands trembled.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Only then did I notice that through his helmet, his eyes were glistening with fear.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Only then did I notice that through his helmet, his eyes were glistening with fear.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Only then did I notice that through his helmet, his eyes were glistening with fear.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Leave it to me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Leave it to me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Leave it to me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I will protect Dame Grace.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I will protect Dame Grace.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I will protect Dame Grace.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you. If there's such a thing as a next life, I hope we can fight together again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you. If there's such a thing as a next life, I hope we can fight together again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you. If there's such a thing as a next life, I hope we can fight together again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if I'm just swinging a something like a bamboo sword like always.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if I'm just swinging a something like a bamboo sword like always.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if I'm just swinging a something like a bamboo sword like always.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Damn it. I don't want to die.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Damn it. I don't want to die.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Damn it. I don't want to die.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you for coming all this way.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you for coming all this way.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you for coming all this way.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We meet face-to-face at last, Demon Lord.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We meet face-to-face at last, Demon Lord.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We meet face-to-face at last, Demon Lord.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I see.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I see.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I see.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So you are the current Star Guide.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So you are the current Star Guide.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So you are the current Star Guide.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What happened to my knights?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What happened to my knights?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What happened to my knights?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I granted them the rest they longed for and killed everyone.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I granted them the rest they longed for and killed everyone.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I granted them the rest they longed for and killed everyone.

root.m_Talk_ENG: For the Demon Lord himself to come for someone like me. How unusual.
root.m_Talk_DEU: For the Demon Lord himself to come for someone like me. How unusual.
root.m_Talk_FRA: For the Demon Lord himself to come for someone like me. How unusual.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Were you that afraid of humanity's counterattack?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Were you that afraid of humanity's counterattack?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Were you that afraid of humanity's counterattack?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The ember of hope you leave behind reeks of defiance.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The ember of hope you leave behind reeks of defiance.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The ember of hope you leave behind reeks of defiance.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hope that defeat isn't the end... That is unbearably cruel to me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hope that defeat isn't the end... That is unbearably cruel to me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hope that defeat isn't the end... That is unbearably cruel to me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And so, I've come to sever that cycle myself.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And so, I've come to sever that cycle myself.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And so, I've come to sever that cycle myself.

root.m_Talk_ENG: To bring about the ending I desire, through the end of this world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: To bring about the ending I desire, through the end of this world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: To bring about the ending I desire, through the end of this world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A being who's stolen so many lives wishing for his own end. How contradictory.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A being who's stolen so many lives wishing for his own end. How contradictory.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A being who's stolen so many lives wishing for his own end. How contradictory.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you're the Star Guide, you should know that this is an eternal cycle.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you're the Star Guide, you should know that this is an eternal cycle.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you're the Star Guide, you should know that this is an eternal cycle.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'd do anything to break free of it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'd do anything to break free of it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'd do anything to break free of it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if it means destroying the world with my own hands.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if it means destroying the world with my own hands.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if it means destroying the world with my own hands.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Surely you too tried to cast off your fate by passing your burden onto someone else?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Surely you too tried to cast off your fate by passing your burden onto someone else?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Surely you too tried to cast off your fate by passing your burden onto someone else?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You and I are no different.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You and I are no different.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You and I are no different.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We just stand on opposite sides of a fading line.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We just stand on opposite sides of a fading line.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We just stand on opposite sides of a fading line.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I am nothing like you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I am nothing like you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I am nothing like you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So you choose a futile struggle.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So you choose a futile struggle.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So you choose a futile struggle.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That is why your kind will lose.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That is why your kind will lose.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That is why your kind will lose.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Allow me to offer you a prophecy as the Star Guide.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Allow me to offer you a prophecy as the Star Guide.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Allow me to offer you a prophecy as the Star Guide.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The peace you seek will never come, Demon Lord.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The peace you seek will never come, Demon Lord.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The peace you seek will never come, Demon Lord.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then I too shall proclaim, as the Demon Lord.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then I too shall proclaim, as the Demon Lord.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then I too shall proclaim, as the Demon Lord.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In this world, there will be no salvation for your kind.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In this world, there will be no salvation for your kind.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In this world, there will be no salvation for your kind.
